description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named pull_request that runs on every pull request to the master, release, and ci-test branches, and allows manual triggering. The workflow consists of two jobs: lint and test. The lint job runs in a clang-format-3.9 container, clones the Apache Pegasus source code, and checks code formatting. The test job depends on lint, runs in a ubuntu1804 container with prebuilt third-parties, checks out the code, unpacks third-parties, compiles, packages server and tools, and runs unit tests.
